description: This Rust source file provides a function 'info' that extracts and displays detailed C2PA metadata information from a given asset file, including provenance, manifest data, validation status, and manifest count. It also contains a test module for the 'info' function.

classes.name: Options
classes.description: A struct implementing IngredientOptions with a thumbnail method that returns None.

methods.name: info
methods.description: Extracts and displays C2PA metadata information from the specified file path, including provenance, manifest data, validation status, and manifest count.
